summary: Iteration 29: Feature Testing - All requested features verified. Backend 12/12 PASSED, Frontend all features working correctly.

minor.issue: Backend accepts invalid usernames (too short, special chars) - validation is frontend-only

test_credentials.note: Guest flow used with X-Guest-Id header for testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 29 are working. Route is /chat. Free tier rate limits: 5 batch runs, 2 roleplay runs, 25 chats per 24h.

auth_register_flow.details: Register flow works, username validation messaging shows '3-32 chars. Letters, numbers, underscore, hyphen.' Submit button disabled for invalid usernames

chat_tab_gestures_disabled.details: Message 'Gestures are temporarily disabled. Use buttons for navigation and locking.' visible in Prompt carousel subtitle

chat_tab_font_buttons.details: A- and A+ buttons visible with scale indicator showing '1.00x'

chat_tab_single_room_toggle.details: Single room mode toggle visible and checked by default. Text: 'Single room mode — send every prompt to all active instances'

chat_tab_comparison_mode.details: View mode buttons (Carousel, Columns, Stack) visible when prompts/responses exist

chat_tab_token_display.details: Token displays visible: 'Chat total: 163 tokens', 'Instances: 1', 'Developers: 1', per-developer list (openai: 163), per-instance list (Welcome Guide: 163)

synthesis_tab_queue_persistence.details: Queue persistence toggle exists with scope labels. Shows 'Session only (guest)' for guests with toggle disabled

synthesis_layout.details: Code verified: grid layout with md:grid-cols-[280px_1fr] - instance metadata (280px) on left, response content (1fr) on right

batch_runs_tab.details: Batch Runs builder and inventory sections visible. View responses button opens drawer when runs exist

roleplay_runs_tab.details: Roleplay Runs builder visible with Stage 1 Roleplay pattern, player participants, DM/GM host config, Execute pipeline button

backend_chat_token_fields.details: Chat response payload includes: developer_id, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, tokens_estimated

notes: All 11 requested features verified and working
Username validation is frontend-only (backend accepts any username)
Token fields in chat response: developer_id, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, tokens_estimated
Synthesis layout uses CSS grid: md:grid-cols-[280px_1fr] for instance metadata left, response right
Roleplay run execution not tested due to rate limits but builder UI verified
